EPUBLIC

OF THE MARSHAL

ISLANDS

LSEAL

SEPILPILIN

KE

EJUKAKN

OFFICE of the

President

Office of the President

05 September 2007

MINISTÈRE DES AFFAIRES ÉTRANGÈRES

NATIONS UMIES

12 SEP. 2007

Honorable Minister,

ET ORGANISATIGN INTERNATIONALES

I have personally tasked His Excellency Ambassador Yong YI JI of the Republic of the

Marshall Islands to hand-delivered the Republic of the Marshall Islands' Instrument of

Accession for the Convention relating to International Exhibitions.

Please accept, Honorable, the assurances of my highest consideration.

Whten !. Philippo

Acting President

The Honorable Bernard Kouchner

Minister of Foreign and European Affairs

Paris, FRANCE

Tel.: (692) 625-3445 / 625-3213

Fax: (692) 625-4021

Email: presoft@ntamarn t

President

Government of the

Republic of the Marshall Islands

Instrument of Accession

Whereas the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928:

Whereas the Convention was amended and supplemented by the Protocols of 10

May 1948, 16 November 1966, 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988:

And whereas Article 3 of the 1972 Protocol provides to the effect that the

Protocol shall remain open for accession by Government Parties to the 1928 Convention after 29 November 1973:

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of the Marshall Islands hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the

Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, Kessai H. Note, President of the Republic of the

Marshall Islands, have signed the present Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the Government of the Republic of the Marshall Islands to be hereunto affixed.

Done at Majuro, Republic of the Marshall Islands, on the thirty-first day of

August in the year two thousand and seven.
